rationale.edition: All changed files are under OSS paths: src/config/src/ and web/src/. None touch enterprise/, o2_enterprise/, or any enterprise-gated modules. No enterprise keywords (cipher, SSO, SAML, RBAC, SDR) appear in the changed paths or symbols.
rationale.skip: The change is not doc-only, CI-only, or comment-only. It adds a user-facing CSV media type option to the CreateReport dashboard report UI and wires up CSV data-collection infrastructure. No explicit skip marker (tests-added label or skip comment) was present.
rationale.e2e: E2E is warranted because the CreateReport.vue UI now shows a new 'CSV (Data)' option in the media-type dropdown, and conditionally hides attachment-type and custom-dimensions sections when CSV is selected. A user can interact with this flow end-to-end: create/edit a report, select CSV media type, and observe the conditional UI changes.
rationale.area: Reports — the primary user-facing UI change is in web/src/components/reports/CreateReport.vue. The backend enum change in reports.rs and the TypeScript interface in report.ts also live in the reports domain. The dashboard-panel changes are supporting infrastructure for the reports feature.
rationale.group: Reports — no existing playwright.yml or E2E test directory could be located in this repo to reference an existing matrix shard group. The Reports group would need to be created by the Engineer when the E2E test infrastructure is set up.
rationale.existing_tests: No Playwright E2E specs (tests/ui-testing/playwright-tests/) are present in the diff. No E2E coverage exists for this new feature.
